---
title: "TRI Conversion Analytics"
subtitle: "Interactive GA4 session-level dashboard for the Trauma Resource Institute"
format: html
---

## About This App

This Shiny application analyzes **28 days of GA4 event-level data** for the Trauma Resource Institute (TRI). It tracks user sessions, conversion funnels, page depth behavior, device breakdowns, and traffic sources — and fits a logistic regression model to identify predictors of booking conversions.

## Launch the App

[Shiny App](https://ashleyxlee.shinyapps.io/msdm-project/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
